title: Cryptool partners with BSCS to host and manage launchpad pools
content_html:
Cryptool is collaborating with several top-tier launchpads to host and manage their pool events on the platform. As part of this work, Cryptool now handles vesting management and broader pool services for their users.

The first named partner is BSCS, a well-established launchpad in the BNB ecosystem.

For launchpad users, this means a single place to see investments, vesting schedules and distributions. More launchpad partnerships will be announced over the coming weeks.
author: Cryptool
